title: justicia cystolithosa
intro: Justicia cystolithosa, also known as the bladderwort or water bladderwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia cystolithosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas or infusions, or dried and used in capsule form, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
